allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('/tmp/alma2.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(j\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('nodes:', \(j.nodes||[]\).map\(n=>n.name\).join\(' | '\)\); console.log\('active:', j.active\); console.log\('versionId:', j.versionId\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./.scratch/alma2-current.json'\); console.log\('top keys:', Object.keys\(j\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('active:', j.active\); console.log\('versionId:', j.versionId\); console.log\('settings:', JSON.stringify\(j.settings\)\); console.log\('nodes:'\); for\(const n of \(j.nodes||[]\)\) console.log\(' -', n.name, '['+n.type+']'\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./.scratch/alma2-modified.json'\); const n=j.nodes[3]; const expected=['parameters','id','name','type','typeVersion','position','credentials','disabled','notes','notesInFlow','onError','retryOnFail','executeOnce','alwaysOutputData','continueOnFail','maxTries','waitBetweenTries']; const extra=Object.keys\(n\).filter\(k=>!expected.includes\(k\)\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(n\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('extra:', extra.join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(curl -sS -o .scratch/alma-probe.json -w 'HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\\nTIME:%{time_total}s\\n' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sessionId":"__TRACKED_VAR__","chatInput":"Hola, necesito ayuda urgente, mi mama acaba de fallecer en Maracaibo"}' https://vmi2945958.contaboserver.net/webhook/alma)

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('count:', j.data.length\); for\(const p of j.data\) console.log\(' -', p.product_key, '|', p.notes || p.product_key, '| $'+p.price, '| cv1='+p.custom_value1, '| cv3='+\(p.custom_value3||''\)\);}\);")

Bash(curl -sS -o .scratch/chat-r1.json -w 'HTTP:%{http_code} TIME:%{time_total}s\\n' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sessionId":"__TRACKED_VAR__","message":"Hola, mi padre falleció en Maracaibo hace una hora, necesito ayuda urgente. Es católico."}' http://localhost:8787/chat)
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('count:', j.data.length\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('emergency-products count:', \(j.data||[]\).length\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err:', d.slice\(0,200\)\);}}\);")
Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./.scratch/exec-list.json'\); for\(const e of \(j.data||[]\).slice\(0,3\)\) console.log\(e.id, e.status, e.startedAt\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./.scratch/exec-6665.json'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(j\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('finished:', j.finished\); const d=j.data; if\(!d\){console.log\('no data'\); process.exit\(0\);} console.log\('data keys:', typeof d==='string' ? 'STRING len='+d.length : Object.keys\(d\).join\(', '\)\);")
